corrections.text: The headline says Washington "Cut Off Foreign Access to Anthropic's Claude." The US order, as reported by MarkTechPost, applied specifically to Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5, Anthropic's two newest models; access to other Claude models (including Opus 4.8) was unaffected. The article's summary and body correctly scope the order to Fable 5 and Mythos 5, but the unqualified "Anthropic's Claude" in the headline could be read as covering all Claude models.
